1980s Mode in Yandere Simulator.[6]She is the wife of Jokichi Yudasei and the mother of Ayano Aishi.

It has been confirmed from the first Basement Tape that Ryoba is the same girl featured in the Mysterious Tapes whom The Journalist confronted. She will be overseas for 10 weeks for Story Mode[7] because she is chasing down The Journalist, as said in Basement Tape #10.

You were a transferred student over your new high school, You didn’t knew that your life would turn upside down the moment you’ve met Ryoba Aishi.. who you bumped into few weeks ago.

Now you’re trapped inside that crazy psychopath’s basement, she has tied you up to a chair so you wouldn’t dare to escape from her.. despite her sweet nature you knew she’s Just doing it keep here by all to herself..
